defs: Reduced in rank, character, or reputation; debased; sunken; low; base.
quotes: The Netherlands . . . were reduced practically to a very degraded condition.

defs: Having the typical characters or organs in a partially developed condition, or lacking certain parts.
quotes: Some families of plants are degraded dicotyledons.

defs: Having steps; -- said of a cross each of whose extremities finishes in steps growing larger as they leave the center; -- termed also on degrees.
